description: This is a low-poly 3D model of a park bench with two figures sitting on it, illuminated by a streetlamp. The figures, rendered in a blocky, pixelated style, are seated side-by-side. One figure wears a white t-shirt and blue pants, while the other wears a pink t-shirt and white pants. The bench itself is made of wooden planks. The streetlamp is dark gray with a yellow light fixture, casting a warm glow. The overall scene is set against a plain, gradient brown background. The style is reminiscent of early video games or a minimalist aesthetic.
